source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Neutrons are contained in a “bottle”. Use m = 1 u for the mass of a neutron. The neutrons are traveling towards a copper lattice that acts as a diffraction grating. Find the angle \theta [away from the forward direction], where the first order diffraction peak is found!
